review_title: Efficient reporting saves time, core part of business
description: We have been using AA for 4 years now and in that time Agency Analytics has become a core part of our business offering, allowing us to provide real-time reporting to our SEO clients. A lot of agencies only send monthly reports, often late - whereas with Agency Analytics our clients can always see their results and ROI anytime of the day or month without having to wait. The dashboard and reports can be fully customised to only show the info that clients want to see, and there are dozens of different integrations with other platforms.
author: Colin M.
pros: Saves me time every month, automated reporting, live reporting dashboard, dozens of integrations
cons: Haven't had any significant issues, and the features we requested were implemented

review_title: Good Solid Product
description: AgencyAnalytics is amazing. While there are a handful of features that I would love to see implemented (Customisable report cover pages for example) it is light years above the alternatives (and I know I've trialled them all). Their support is lightning fast and unusually (for Saas platforms) helpful. Their development schedule is also really fast and in the 2-3 years that we have been using it, they have probably rolled out 3-4 features that we have requested ourselves. I've never seen such fast adoption of user suggestions. It's almost the standout feature. If some limitation really bugs you enough for you to take the time to register it as a feature request, there's a very high chance it will get adopted. Other than that, it does what it says on the box. It's super stable (although occasionally prone to crash on the first of the month when server load must be very high) and certainly favours simplicity and ease of use in it's UX.
author: Sam M.
pros: Super easy to use. Easy to white label. Keyword rankings update daily. Really cost-effective. Open and transparent pricing, which is super easy to scale up and down as needed. Essential tools built-in and integrates with everything else. Purpose-built for modern digital agencies
cons: The cover page of the reports is super ugly, like unbelievably ugly and they offer no options to customize this. Other than the cover page, the rest of the interface is quite nicely designed, but so many agencies now use it more granular visual customisation would be welcome.

review_title: Very Responsive SEO Tool For Data & Reports
description: My overall experience with AgencyAnalytics is truly excellent. I have been using their software for many years, and it has been instrumental in streamlining some of my business processes. The user interface is easy to navigate, making it suitable for both inexperienced and experienced users alike. The reporting capabilities are second-to-none, allowing me to pull meaningful insights from the data quickly and easily. Support is highly responsive and incredibly helpful when needed. Furthermore, the pricing is quite reasonable compared to other similar solutions on the market. I would confidently recommend AgencyAnalytics to others without hesitation!
author: Sarfaraz K.
pros: I have used AgencyAnalytics for a significant period of time and I must say, it is an exceptional piece of software. Its performance tracking feature allows me to quickly gain insights into how well my campaigns are performing, making it easy to identify which ones need further optimization. With its intuitive and user-friendly design, I am able to set up projects and monitor key metrics with minimal effort. Finally, another perk I really appreciate is the automated report generator that creates professional reports in a matter of seconds. All in all, these features make AgencyAnalytics an essential tool for any marketing team or agency that is serious about gaining an advantage over their competition.
cons: One part of AgencyAnalytics software that I found the least enjoyable was the inflexibility of the reporting. It was difficult to create reports with more robust analytics, such as multiple metrics and detailed segmentation, without having to manually input data sources. The platform had limited capacity when it came to configuring report dimensions and tracking custom dimensions, which severely limited my ability to gain the insights I wanted from our performance reports. Furthermore, there were quite a few occasions where I encountered bugs in their software or had difficulty getting technical support for my issues. All these things combined led me to have a less favorable experience with AgencyAnalytics compared to other analytical platforms I have used before.

review_title: Perfect Software for Marketing Agencies Handling Multiple Clients
description: Overall, I'm generally pleased with Agency Analytics.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really like the organization of this software and the vast amount of integrations. I also like that the Agency Analytics team takes feedback and makes updates based on the feedback. They've had a few updates with my feedback implemented.
cons: They don't offer grid tracking for Google maps which means we have to use another software for that.

review_title: The Ultimate Time-Saver
description: We came to Agency Analytics for better monthly reporting, but the dashboards have completely transformed our analytics processes. The report templates and auto-send feature cut my monthly reporting time in half, and the reports also look really nice!
author: Nicole Q.
pros: I LOVE the customizable dashboards. Being able to select the data points I want - and removing what I don't need - is a huge pro for me. It's so streamlined, clean and easily digestible.
cons: This is small - and I'm digging for a con, because I think it's a nearly perfect platform - but it would be nice to be able to add a manual page to the monthly reports, where I could upload images (such as screenshots of notable social media engagement).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best way to manage reporting for your clients
description: Been using them for their agency plan for over 5+ years now. They have changed the way we manage reporting and increased our productive in that department.
author: Feraud O.
pros: I was able to analyze multiple analytics (ads, website, etc) for our clients from one place. Not only that but you can grant clients access to view customized dashboards for real time reporting. This help cut down the time most client call to check in as we can show them real time stats in a easy to view way.
cons: What would be nice to for them to have different themes maybe for dashboard. Right now you can customize it to have different colors but what would be nice if they had different "looks".

review_title: Best overall SMB Reporting tool hands down
author: Glenn M.
pros: We are a consulting business with many small to medium business clients. One of the biggest challenges they face is a lack of visibility of their online marketing. The agency analytics platform beautifully and simply consolidates data from all the major platforms that our clients utilise. This saves them (and us) from having to receive, find or generate multiple reports from multiple platforms. Let's face it most SMB's won't even bother! The increased visility has massively increased the trust and value seen in our relationship and that is an integral part of our business.
cons: ONly a single white-label option for logos etc. Rather than constantly promoting ourselves with the images and logos etc we would much rather personalise it to each customer so they then get an even stronger sense of ownership of the data. if they saw it as THEIR reporting platform i strongly believe that the length of contract and LTV of each client would be much greater AND they could even keep the reporting platform on if they move agencies.

review_title: Recommend this Tool for Agencies
description: My overall experience was very good with this tool and I recommend this tool because they also provide API to integrate it with your own system.
author: Muhammad T.
pros: We were using this software in our Digital Marketing agency for more than 2 years and it was the best tool for tracking keywords rankings. The rankings were very accurate as compared to another tool. I like their local 3 pack rankings option also because it shows exact rank for each keyword in Google Local 3 pack. Their servers are built to bear maximum load as we had thousands of keywords in our account for 300+ projects at that time.
cons: It is a bit expensive than other tools but I think they deserve this price for the tool. I don't see any cons in this tool.

review_title: Awesome
author: Ryan S.
pros: I love the many different integrations. Its a great way to client a snapshot of everything that is going on. Its also very easy to use and set up.
cons: I wish the SEO audit reports can be customized to show more in depth to the client. In order for me to show a specific area of concern, I have to go to that section and print it off.

review_title: The must-have reporting software for agencies
description: Agency Analytics has revolutionised our client reporting. I couldn't recommend it enough. The platform is easy to use and simple to set up. The white label dashboard and reports are fantastic and intuitive and clients would never know its not yours! Clients love the transparency you can offer them with the live dashboard and its also a great client retention tool.
author: Stuart D.
pros: The white label dashboard and reports are fantastic and intuitive and clients would never know its not yours! Easy to set up scheduled reports & dashboards Takes the faff out of monthly reporting A great client retention tool!
cons: Isn't any! although i guess it the price could be a bit keener or allow more keywords/campaigns within the basic packages.-

review_title: Agency Analytics provides clear, easy to understand actionable info in the reporting
description: great it's helped me provide clarity regarding performance concerns on many calls!
author: Taylor C.
pros: ability to show prospects info about existing online marketing performance vs ideal / expected performance that could be achieved working with us
cons: data doesnt always populate for volume and competition - never sure why it just happens randomly and wont show up no matter how long I wait

review_title: The absolute best reporting tool on the market!
description: We were wasting so much time setting up and editing reports for clients each month using Google Data Studio. Our team of account managers hated it. Then a new team member recommended Agency Analytics and we were blown away once we started using it. The support is also phenomenal. You can always chat to a support agent within minutes via the Live Chat on the website.
author: Lee W.
pros: The responsiveness and speed of the platform is amazing. It used to take up to an hour to set up a report for a client using Google Data Studio, but I can create a brand new client project and report in minutes with Agency Analytics.
cons: The backlink manager tool is amazing, but it's a shame that you can't choose which SEO platform you'd like to get the domain metrics from. By default it gathers the domain data from Moz but we prefer to use Ahrefs for this data. Not a big deal though!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great for project management and reporting
description: Launch North has been utilizing Agency Analytics for quite some time now, and after trialing many other competitors we really can't fault their system. It's easy to use, accurate, our customers love it and more importantly their customer support can't be beaten. I've recommended Agency Analytics to many other companies.
author: Chris S.
pros: Daily campaign management and reporting.
cons: We haven't found any cons to the software as of yet.

review_title: Great Software
description: Agency Analytics listens to there users, and constantly builds features that they want. Their software is packed with features and is also very affordable. I have been using the software for over 5 years and have been amazed at the product they have built.
author: Nick J.
pros: Easy to use, one-stop-shop, always being updated.
cons: I have no cons to list. Their software meets all of our requirements and more.

review_title: Great Reporting System at a Reasonable Cost
description: The system is great and easy to use. Their customer service has always been top notch - one of the best I've experienced from a SAAS.
author: Amanda K.
pros: Easy to use and has a large list of integrations.
cons: If something doesn't integrate natively, it can be a little challenging to get the data into the system and displaying how we'd like. Luckily, our 'manual' imports are pretty minimal.

review_title: Amazingly robust tool that keeps getting better year after year
author: Shareef D.
pros: Agency Analytics is a sophisticated marketing tool that we've been using loyally for years. Tons of configurations for keyword tracking - from local searches to mobile SERPs and more. It integrates with many of our other tool sets (paid search, email, social, call tracking...) and they keep adding to the list. Love it when a company continues to invest in product development and evolves with the industry and technology like Agency Analytics does.
cons: We've had no issues with Agency Analytics that their support team hasn't resolved quickly and comprehensively.

review_title: The best analytics tool I've found for agencies.
description: Agency Analytics has exactly what I need in terms of cost-effectiveness, ease of use, white label reporting, and competitive features. I especially like the UI; something about it makes me feel relaxed while using it. Finally, customer service is very fast and responsive.
author: Carlton S.
pros: Ease of use, nice UI, affordability
cons: Site audits could be faster, but I also understand how long some websites can take to crawl.

review_title: Great Analytics Dashboard for a Digital Agency
description: We needed to automate reports, give clients one login to view all their analytics, social, rankings, backlinks, site audit, adwords campaigns, social media advertising campaigns and anything else you could think of - Agency Analytics does all this and you can white label it! If you're an agency not using this software then you have probably developed your own platform or you're missing out.
author: Harry J.
pros: Integrates nearly everything you could think of Custom reporting Automated reports to customers Very easy to use and set up Great support
cons: Reporting tool could use a few features Would love to be able to resell it Natural language generator would make it undisputed king of reports Would really like to have ability to install our own help software in it (intercom, zendesk chat e.t.c.)

review_title: Fantastic software
description: We save lots of time. The software enables us to distribute good looking scheduled reports. Our team also use it on a daily basis.
author: Daniel D.
pros: We signed up for Agency Analytics to save time on overseeing multiple online accounts. As our company grew we started using the reporting automation features and gave access to clients. It is a core part of our business now.
cons: Nothing, everything is great about the software. The only thing we miss is a dedicated app for mobile however shortcuts can be created.

review_title: Agency Analytics takes the stress out of ranking updates and monthly reporting
description: I have been in the industry for 10 years and used a lot of reporting tools. I have to admit that Agency Analytics is the best one I have use in terms of both the software itself and value for money. This tool is a must for any online marketing company.
author: Deniz D.
pros: The integrations are fantastic and a great value for money.
cons: Everything is fine from my end, however have a summary at each section of the reporting about what is going on with the data will be pretty good. Will save me a lot of time writing emails.

review_title: Makes things so much easier!
description: It made my reporting so much easier. The simplified insights have helped me assess where we need to improve.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really love that I can pull complicated reports so quickly. It saves me a lot of time. I really like the integrations with social media.
cons: I really wish there was some way to track monthly followers on Instagram. It seems to be an issue for everyone.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Super Easy to Use and Robust
description: Their product did what I wanted it to and more, on top of that their support staff continually reached out to me to make sure I was able to make use of the product even before I had made a purchase.
author: Kellee C.
pros: I like that it reports on everything I could think of right out of the box and more. I wasn't expecting it to be a tool in my SEO Toolbox and then it was. I also like that I ties in to review apps and social networks as well.
cons: I wish it had review gathering software inside it. It's not a deal breaker because it does so much. Just something nice in addition to all the reporting.
author_profession: Managing Director - Wearer of Many Hats
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Saves me A LOT of time and money
description: I really love using Agency Analytics, I used to spend hours and hours writing marketing reports and taking screenshots of campaigns, but since I found Agency Analytics, I feel like it was a life saver for me to set the weekly, fortnightly and monthly marketing reports for ALL my clients automatically and totally forget about it as well as getting hours and hours of my time back to work on my business and deliver actual results to my clients. Agency Analytics definitely was a life saver for me. Highly recommend it to agency owners. Not only it frees up a lot of yours and your staff's time but also clients would appreciate that beautiful, easy to understand reports. I have other tools that offer marketing reports but never switched to them for reporting. nothing replaced Agency Analytics so far. Love it!
author: Zara B.
pros: Beautiful and appealing design, easy to use, automatic marketing results report to the clients on a weekly, fortnightly and monthly basis.
cons: The SEO tracking integration could have been more precise and better I believe, but still a great software to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Everything you need in one place
description: Just love the product. Every intergration we needed with extras.
author: Andy B.
pros: We spent awhile looking for a reporting tool that covered our complete needs. Mostly didn't include any data around local rankings and backlines but contained all of the intergration points. AgencyAnalytics however ticks the box very nicely for us and our clients. One reporting tool instead of two which was key for our change.
cons: Report layouts a little limted. We'd love to see these move to landscape for better viewing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great SEO reporting tool
description: Nice tool. Great not just for keeping track of SEO metrics (daily rankings!) , but also for automatically reporting on them to clients. Much recommended.
author: Robbert Z.
pros: Automatic brandable reports
cons: Agency Analytics is not as simple as it used to be. But in return there is more functionality.
